title: US-LatAm Interventions Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: Major update covering unprecedented 2026 US interventions: Operation Absolute Resolve (January 3) in which US Special Operations forces captured Venezuelan President Maduro in Caracas; Trump's EO 14380 Cuba oil blockade (January 29)—the first naval blockade of Cuba since the 1962 Missile Crisis; US Special Forces deployment to Ecuador (March 4); and Pentagon warnings of potential 15,000-troop Latin American deployment. Six daily event files were created covering January–April 2026. Timeline, KPIs, map points, political figures, claims, and casualties sections updated to reflect the most dramatic escalation of US military activity in Latin America since the 1989 Panama invasion. Breaking status set active.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Fri Apr 10, 2026
summary: US Media Compares Trump Mass Deportations to Cold War-Era Latin American Disappearances.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Mon Mar 30, 2026
summary: A Russian tanker carrying approximately 100,000 tonnes of crude oil arrived in Havana on March 30, 2026, as Russia attempted to circumvent the US oil blockade imposed by Executive Order 14380.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Thu Mar 19, 2026
summary: Pentagon Warns of Potential 15,000-Troop Deployment Across Latin America.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Wed Mar 4, 2026
summary: The Pentagon announced on March 3–4, 2026 that US Special Forces had been embedded with Ecuadorian commandos for joint operations against narco-terrorist organizations in Ecuador.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Thu Jan 29, 2026
summary: President Trump signed Executive Order 14380 on January 29, 2026, declaring a national emergency and authorizing tariffs on any country that directly or indirectly supplies oil to Cuba.

title: US Interventions in Latin America Update — Sat Jan 3, 2026
summary: On January 3, 2026, US Special Operations forces launched Operation Absolute Resolve against Venezuela.
